name: skoghooks
description: Reference implementation of all 13 Claude Code hook lifecycle events — TTS notifications, LLM-generated completion messages, smart permission auto-allow, session context injection, and transcript archiving.

plugins.name: skoghooks
plugins.description: All 13 Claude Code hook lifecycle events in one plugin. Covers session management, tool gating (blocks rm -rf and .env access), TTS alerts, LLM-generated completion messages, smart permission auto-allow for read-only ops, pre-compact transcript backup, and session chat export.
